name: Star Wars: Bounty Hunter
description:
Thank you for 500 followers!

The Empire has fallen, a new Republic rises, and the Outer Rim is a wretched hive of scum and villainy.

Set during the time of the New Republic. The Emperor is dead, as is Darth Vader. Princess Leia is back on Coruscant building a new galactic government, Luke Skywalker is training the next generation of Jedi, all while Grand Admiral Thrawn is out there somewhere preparing to create a new empire.

In this narrative you're a bounty hunter looking for work on Trandosha. Here you'll meet Mylia Scor, a broker for the bondsman guild who will offer you the chance to hunt down and capture the galaxies worst.

Thanks for 500 followers guys. For all of my success in botmaking I've always struggled to gain any kind of following. So after over two long years it feels good to finally hit this benchmark.
creator: Dreamsofdust
